content: What would be some good characters to pair with Sorel?
In my experience, thais and agrippa are very good for spamming babies

Then you can hit big sorel ults constantly, also i think aigis probably would work pretty well although i dont use her personally
uhhh idk who else is especially good at making babies

pickman is good for sorel since he's also good at generating embryos iirc, plus his cards applying weakness and other utility his kit offers
(I only use him at e0 though so idk how well he works w/sorel otherwise 🤷 )
I use Sorel Thais Pikmin Faint and it works well, though I’ve been played for a while so they’re all high investment

But don’t be afraid to experiment with team building in the early chapters

I'm on Arc 2 Chapter 2 and elites/bosses here casually do 400-600-800-1000-1200 etc. ramping damage every ~3 turns, and it's hard to negate that even with all the thais card duplication, lily's shields, xu's str reduction and thais'/doll's weakness, especially when releasing exalts for more defense power has a good chance of just making the situation worse due to the Madness +enemy hitcount mechanic
a lot of arachne's mechs scales from her stats so just lvl her for now
act 2 needs soulforge investment
at least some

make sure to upgrade that

yeah i don't think i did that yet
will do
might not be enough but you should see some difference at 4-6 soul forge for everybody
you might also want to try lone seed to duplicate important cards fast in case thais is not able to exalt
bro arachne is so good.
arachne will melt all of arc 1
do you know how to use her tho?
i think so
like she wants exalt after annihilation or ultra turn
then she will start following up with doom
wait can u show me how to play her
her basic gameplay is accumulating weaver stacks. at e0 you have max of 3.  increase to 5 at e3.

to accumulate her stacks efficiently you first want to play her cost 3 (fate binding) into her cost 1 (eternal loom). dont have to be in the same turn but cost 3 will increase the yield for her cost 1
the order is 3 fate then eternal?
wait pursuit triggers after using annihilation too?
if i dont follow it the stuck dispapears?
once you have 3 or 5 (in the future). you will either need to trigger annihilate and then exalt or exalt during ultra turn
wait that's so insane what
this is how you annihilate. with arachne in team specifically it has 3 turns cd.
her rouse also allows you to choose a specific card when annihilating
she's so fricking broken 🥹

Aequor is pretty steep in terms of investment requirements especially if you want to play them a certain way
Can you tell me more about this? I'm a bit more on the casual side, so I don't usually go deep on kits

Aequor relies more on the team's overall stats than other realms because they rely on Tentacles(which scale with the team's stats). So in endgame they need disproportionately more investment than other realms for the same results. Exceptions apply to this like Vortice or GMurphy but they don't use Tulu as a DPS, more as a support
<@113374123798859776> come and do your Aequor propaganda
I'm listening

Actually my current main story team is Corpolu (Corpo+Tulu discard team)
There Corpo and Tulu are co-dps in the team and you feel rewarded for playing Tulu's cards
Oh?
Are the other two just flexible Lemuria slots?
Damn Redz you suck at this
It's okay, I can wait

Not just lemurian slots
You can also use other generic good characters like the Caro supports (Leigh/Pickman/Thais), the Chaos supports (Ramona, Hameln, Ryker, Tawil) or the Ultra ones (Horla, Casiah, Clem)
Murphy herself is also a pretty solid choice 
Here is an example of what my team would look like (please ignore the investment level, the team was that good I couldn't stop me from investing further)

Lemurians as a team generally want GMurphy as a core unit, and want all the team slots to be Lemurian. This is because they each have a Soulforge passive(arc 2 stuff. Late game stuff) that buffs the team based on how many team slots are Lemurian. If you run Tulu with lemurians you're running them all ideally
Lemurians: Tulu, Faros, Goliath, Miryam, GMurphy
How many characters do I need to OE for all-Lemuria and non teams?
Lemurians are fine with just GMurphy being OE. Idk about non-lemurians though

For all Lemuria you really want GMurphy OE as she is the star and main carry of the team
For Discard variant (Corpo variants) you want Corpo OE or Corpo E3 + Gmurphy (any investment)
Tulu himself can become useful once he is E1+ and gets access to the true power of his 4 cost
Can you teach me the general working of the Corpo Discard team for future reference?
Or if it's too much of a hassle, a redirect is also good

The general idea is to Rouse Tulu, spam the deck with Corpo pilots and discarding as much of your deck as possible every turn
You get this way tons of str and tentacle damage until you can outscale the enemies defensive capabilities and obliterate them with tentacles <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>

During burst turns, you want to use Tulu Exalt + Corpo Exalt for a huge amount of tentacle damage, crit rate and crit damage buff
As well as using Corpo and Tulu 4 cost to rack up even more damage
So I should save up their Exalts until said burst turns?

For Tulu yes since his own exalt is costly and slow to get back (you can still use it very early in the fight because the extra tentacle generated helps)
But Corpo spams her exalt for the team to function since her 2 cost and strike+defense generate a LOT of aliemus by themselves
This way you can use Corpo exalt everytime you need it either for bursting purposes or to cycle your deck faster by discarding your cards
